metadata.description: Spearman ρ of each variable with each SES predictor, aggregated as median across surveys. ses_magnitude = RMS of the 4 rho values. dominant_dim = SES variable with highest |rho|. sexo/edad are demographic dims; escol/Tam_loc are SES dims. L1 items also carry loading (ρ) and loading_gamma (γ) factor loadings against their parent construct. Use loading_gamma for dimensionally consistent prediction chains with the Julia DR bridge: |loading_gamma_A| × |γ(A→B)| × |loading_gamma_B|.

p34_1|MED.interpret_warning: Item was reverse-coded when building its parent construct.
